item_name: Vespel SP-22 direct support rods (3× φ3 mm, L=50 mm)
rejected_reason: Direct Vespel rods create an unacceptable direct 4K-to-10mK conductive path. No thermal interception. Creates direct solid thermal short incompatible with QTA design.
replacement_architecture: Kevlar 49 tension suspension + G-10CR flexures + staged OFHC copper thermal intercepts at 4K/1K/100mK/10mK
notes: Reference calculation: 3 rods × φ3mm × L=50mm gives P_support≈1.2 nW (no interception). Not the committed design. Committed design uses Kevlar/G-10CR (BOM items B003-B006).

rejected_reason: AOM switching time (~100 ns to 1 µs) is incompatible with gating individual 100 fs pulses. Cannot control individual pulse energy.
replacement_architecture: Pockels cell or ultrafast pulse picker with <1 ns switching time
notes: BOM item B023 specifies Pockels cell replacement.
